result.response_content_preview:
THOUGHT:
Since the citation list is currently empty and the paper focuses on real-world pitfalls, failures, and challenges in deep learning, I need to build the bibliography from the ground up. I will start by addressing Category 1 (Summarizing Research) and Category 5 (Highlighting Research Gaps). A foundational, empirically grounded paper that documents real-world data, deployment, and systemic failures in AI/ML is essential to frame the workshop's scope and establish the current state of the field. I will search for a highly relevant study on practical deployment challenges, then systematically target the remaining categories (datasets/models, optimizers, comparative findings, methodologies, supporting arguments, and future research directions) in subsequent rounds.
